text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Honestly... I'm not really feeling it. It's like I'm just
going through the motions.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I can't even remember how I used to run.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Should I even be racing like this?
choice_data_list:
I asked you if you wanted to quit, and you
didn't say yes.

I asked you if you wanted to quit, and you
didn't say yes.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
choice_data_list: So you have no choice but to keep running.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I don't want that. I'm not a loser.
